name: Potato Loaf Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yeast, sugar, salt, and butter in a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle the instant mashed potato flakes over the hot milk and stir until combined.
3. Add the flour mixture to the milk mixture and stir until a dough forms.
4. Select white bread on your bread machine and press "Start".
5. After the first rising, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion in separate loaf pans and cover with plastic wrap.
7. Let the dough rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour until doubled in size.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
